name: God Crafter
short_description: God Crafter is a casual and satisfying 3D clicker game where you, as a god, get to recreate Earth for the humans you create. Shape and design the world with your divine powers. Immerse yourself in a relaxing and rewarding gameplay experience as you build a beautiful and thriving world from scratch.
detailed_description:
God Crafter is a 3D world-building game where you, as a new god, begin by learning the ropes and then creating your own universe.

  • Unlock periodic elements to create the building blocks of life itself.
  • Grow more powerful the more you create.
  • Ensure your humans have everything they need to survive.
  • Choose to become a benevolent god or the devil himself.
